title: CachedProviderRanking
description: The Gold-layer ranking exported to Upstash and consumed by SDKs. Key shape: predictive:ranking:<region>:<model>.

providers_ranked.description: Providers ordered best-first for the given model and region.

scores.description: Provider score map. Higher is better; values may be negative because penalties are subtracted. Must include at least every provider listed in providers_ranked.

attempts_total.description: Total attempts included in the ranking window for this model/region.

window_hours.description: Rolling window size used to compute the ranking.

computed_at.description: When the Gold row that produced this cache value was computed.
